creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rajeev Pillai from comment #6)
> OK, I tried the latest -CURRENT snapshot image and I'm not seeing this issue.
If it had been fixed in -CURRENT, we need to know exact commit(s) which fixed it.  Until then, the real bug could be just masked out by other things or e.g. extra debugging turned on in -CURRENT by default.
